response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and a clear track record of building scalable infrastructure and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth systems at enterprise scale — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive experience building scalable, high-throughput systems at Google and Meta.
Proven ability to lead cross-team initiatives and contribute to developer tooling and AI-agent infrastructure.
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and frameworks.
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, guardrails, or rollout automation systems.
Experience with telemetry and statistical analysis is implied but not explicitly documented.
Role requires 8+ years in experimentation platforms; his Meta/Google roles are recent and lack detail on growth systems.
